source: manual production audit: consolidated traceability and evidence-link evidence
summary: Production-ready traceability enforcement: sanitized stale cross-layer paths, enriched KB frontmatter, added unscoped-doc lint, validated evidence links, and fixed stale generated roadmap queue/archive after closure.

commit_descriptions.c8389d7: fix(roadmap): sanitize stale code_paths after core/engine migration
commit_descriptions.5436f7e: feat(lint): enforce cross-layer mapping with unscoped-doc check and code_path enrichment
commit_descriptions.eee11ca: fix(roadmap): validate archived task close evidence

red_phase: Before unscoped-doc: 13+ untethered KB docs with no code_paths/spec_paths (smoke test tolerated them as skip-list).
22 done/cancelled roadmap tasks had stale code_paths pointing to deleted core/engine/component paths.
Evidence-link lint did not exist — builds and validations could reference unknown tasks.
Roadmap queue included archived done tasks (generated drift).
green_phase: commit 5436f7e: added unscoped-doc lint rule. 26/26 KB docs now have required frontmatter. 0 unscoped docs.
commit c8389d7: sanitized 22 tasks of stale code_paths. 12 remaining roadmap-unscoped were done/cancelled — later suppressed by open-status-only lint filter.
commit eee11ca: added lintEvidenceLinks (build/validation task refs must resolve to active or archived tasks). implementation-build-missing-acceptance warning for builds lacking acceptance_mapping.
commit eee11ca: writeRoadmapQueue excludes archived tasks (queue only shows open tasks). Archive summary updated to reflect evidence-link validation.
regression_net: scripts/smoke-test.mjs — updated to tolerate unscoped-doc starter warnings, verifies lint lives in index_graph.json
tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs — updated to expect validated impl builds skip reconciliation instead of staying in drift

checks_run.name: npm test
checks_run.note: smoke + build tests adapted for new unscoped-doc and validated-build expectations

checks_run.name: Roadmap queue audit
checks_run.note: Queue only lists TASK-034,TASK-038,TASK-043,TASK-046. No archived TASK-30/TASK-035.

checks_run.name: Evidence-link audit
checks_run.note: All build/validation task_id refs resolve to active or archived tasks.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Knowledge frontmatter requirements are documented and enforced.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: ParsedDoc now parses code_paths + spec_paths. lintMarkdownDocs validates required fields. 26/26 KB docs compliant. Smoke test updated.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Roadmap tasks validate spec_paths, code_paths, goals, acceptance, non-goals, verification, and evidence links.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: lintRoadmapEntries validates field completeness, path existence, and link structure. lintEvidenceLinks validates build/validation task refs. 22 stale tasks sanitized. 12 roadmap-unscoped suppressed for done/cancelled.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Lint identifies missing or broken horizontal and vertical mappings.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: unscoped-doc warning for KB docs lacking code_paths + spec_paths. roadmap-unscoped warning for open tasks without spec/code refs. evidence-missing-task error for builds/validations referencing unknown tasks. implementation-build-missing-acceptance warning.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Generated views expose compact navigation without becoming canonical truth.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: index_graph.json includes lint lenses (issues + counts) and reconciliation views. writeRoadmapQueue writes compact queue with open tasks only. Archive kept in archive.jsonl, not hot queue.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Graph validates alignment for passing implementation builds.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Modified graph.ts: validated implementation builds with passing validation skip reconciliation drift. builder/tester alignment holds. build.validates.build edge created for pass validation.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Active roadmap queue excludes archived tasks.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: writeRoadmapQueue generates queue.json from open_task_ids only. TASK-30 and TASK-035 archived in archive.jsonl, not in queue.

validation_verdict.rationale: All acceptance criteria trace to commits c8389d7/5436f7e/eee11ca with surviving test evidence. Lint validates cross-layer mapping + evidence links. Generated views compact and non-canonical. Queue excludes archived tasks. 0 unscoped KB docs.

unresolved_issues: 1 large-doc lint warning on .codewiki/kb/system/overview.md (1576 words). Acceptable for overview; split/cut tracked as potential follow-up but not blocking.
TASK-035 original implementation build (2026-05-09) stated '0 lint warnings' — predates follow-up commit eee11ca and archive summary update. This build supersedes it.

publication.recommended_commit_title: feat(lint): enforce cross-layer mapping and evidence-link traceability
publication.recommended_commit_body:
Complete traceability enforcement for CodeWiki knowledge-roadmap-code mapping:

- Add unscoped-doc lint: KB docs without code_paths or spec_paths flagged
- Add lintRoadmapEntries: validates task fields, paths, goals, research IDs
- Add lintEvidenceLinks: build/validation task refs must resolve to known tasks
- Add implementation-build-missing-acceptance: warns on builds without acceptance_mapping
- Sanitize 22 done/cancelled tasks of stale code_paths after core/engine migration
- Enrich 13 untethered KB docs with code_paths
- Suppress roadmap-unscoped warnings for done/cancelled tasks
- Graph: validated impl builds skip reconciliation drift; pass validation creates validates edge
- writeRoadmapQueue: generates queue.json from open tasks only (no archived tasks)
- Archive TASK-30 and TASK-035 with updated delta/closure summaries

KB: 26/26 docs frontmatter-compliant. 0 unscoped.
Lint: 1 warning (large-doc on overview.md).

Checks: tsc, architecture, smoke, build tests, codewiki_state — all green.

Evidence: .codewiki/builds/implementation/2026-05-10-traceability-production.json

push_readiness.worktree: has uncommitted implementation builds (this artifact + architecture build)
